title: H002: Complete CI Pipeline & Coverage
description:
**Size:** đźŹ—ď¸Ź large
**Category:** infrastructure
**Priority:** high

## Open Questions

All questions from the initial elaboration have been answered by the user. No remaining ambiguities.

## Summary

Extend the existing `.github/workflows/ci.yaml` (S018) into a full job matrix covering lint, unit tests, integration tests (per operator), E2E tests (kind + Chainsaw), operator Docker image build-and-push to GHCR, and Helm chart OCI push. Add `v*` tag triggers so tagged commits produce versioned images (SemVer stripped from git tag), charts, and a GitHub Release. Create a `.codecov.yml` with component-level coverage thresholds (80% `internal/common/`, 70% operator controllers, 90% webhooks). Use `codecov/codecov-action` for coverage upload.

## Scope

**Included:**
- Extend `ci.yaml` `on.push` trigger to include `tags: ["v*"]`
- **Lint job**: retain existing `lint` (golangci-lint v2.11.3) + `shellcheck` jobs unchanged
- **Test job (unit)**: refactor existing single `test` job into a matrix strategy over `[common, keystone, c5c3]` with `-coverprofile` output per module
- **Test job (integration)**: un-stub `test-integration` Makefile target; add per-operator matrix job with `setup-envtest` binary
- **Coverage upload**: `codecov/codecov-action` with flag-based component separation in both `test` and `test-integration` jobs
- **E2E infra job**: retain existing `e2e-infra` job unchanged
- **E2E keystone job**: new job â€” build operator Docker image, `kind load docker-image`, deploy via Helm chart, run Chainsaw keystone test suites from `tests/e2e/keystone/`
- **Build-and-push job**: build `operators/keystone/Dockerfile`, push to GHCR; image tag = SemVer from git tag (strip `v` prefix) or `main`-branch SHA; conditional on `main` push or `v*` tag; uses `docker/metadata-action` for tag derivation
- **Helm-push job**: `helm package` on `operators/keystone/helm/keystone-operator/`, `helm push` to `oci://ghcr.io/<owner>/charts/`; conditional on `main` push or `v*` tag
- **GitHub Release job**: on `v*` tags only, `gh release create` attaching Helm chart tarball; uses GitHub auto-generated release notes
- **Verify-codegen job**: new gate job running `make manifests && make generate && git diff --exit-code` + `make verify-crd-sync` (from S025)
- **Implement `docker-build` Makefile target**: currently stubbed with error; must support `OPERATOR=<op>` parameter
- **Implement `helm-package` Makefile target**: currently stubbed with error; must support `OPERATOR=<op>` parameter
- **Implement `test-integration` Makefile target**: currently stubbed; wire envtest-based integration tests
- **`.codecov.yml`**: new file with component thresholds â€” 80% `internal/common/`, 70% `operators/*/internal/controller/`, 90% `operators/*/api/`

**Excluded:**
- Modifying `build-images.yaml` (handles OpenStack service container images â€” separate concern, different tag strategy with SBOM/signing)
- Modifying `cleanup-images.yaml`, `verify-container-images.yaml`, `deploy-docs.yaml` (unrelated workflows)
- SBOM generation / cosign signing for operator images (not requested; can follow `build-images.yaml` patterns later)
- c5c3-operator Dockerfile (doesn't exist yet; S022 creates it â€” matrix prepared to accommodate it)
- Release notes generation logic beyond GitHub auto-generated notes
- Branch protection rules or required status checks configuration
- Changes to existing `e2e-infra` job logic
- Changes to `.golangci.yml` lint configuration

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    trigger["on.push: main / PR / tags v*"]

    subgraph gates["Gate Jobs #40;always#41;"]
        lint["lint #40;golangci-lint#41;"]
        shellcheck["shellcheck #40;hack/*.sh#41;"]
        verify["verify-codegen #40;manifests + generate + crd-sync#41;"]
        test["test #40;matrix: common, keystone, c5c3#41;"]
        testint["test-integration #40;matrix: keystone, c5c3#41;"]
    end

    subgraph e2e_group["E2E Jobs"]
        e2einfra["e2e-infra #40;existing: kind + Chainsaw infra#41;"]
        e2eop["e2e-keystone #40;build image + kind load + Helm deploy + Chainsaw#41;"]
    end

    subgraph publish["Publish Jobs #40;main / v* tags only#41;"]
        buildpush["build-and-push #40;keystone operator image to GHCR#41;"]
        helmpush["helm-push #40;OCI push to GHCR#41;"]
    end

    subgraph release_group["Release Job #40;v* tags only#41;"]
        ghrelease["github-release #40;gh release create + chart tarball#41;"]
    end

    codecov["Upload coverage to Codecov"]

    trigger --> gates
    test --> codecov
    testint --> codecov
    gates --> e2e_group
    gates --> publish
    publish --> release_group
```

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Tag as Git Tag v*
    participant CI as ci.yaml
    participant GHCR as ghcr.io
    participant GH as GitHub Releases

    Tag->>CI: Trigger full pipeline
    CI->>CI: Gate jobs #40;lint, test, verify, E2E#41;
    CI->>GHCR: docker push operator:0.1.0
    CI->>GHCR: helm push oci://charts/keystone-operator:0.1.0
    CI->>GH: gh release create v0.1.0 + chart tarball
```

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    subgraph codecov_cfg[".codecov.yml Thresholds"]
        common["internal/common/ >= 80%"]
        controllers["operators/*/internal/controller/ >= 70%"]
        webhooks["operators/*/api/ >= 90%"]
    end
```

## Key Components

- **`ci.yaml` trigger extension**: Add `tags: ["v*"]` to `on.push.branches` sibling, enabling tag-triggered full pipeline runs
- **`verify-codegen` job**: New gate job â€” `make manifests && make generate && git diff --exit-code` + `make verify-crd-sync`; catches uncommitted generated code before merge
- **`test` job (matrix)**: Refactor existing single `test` job into matrix strategy over `[common, keystone, c5c3]`; each entry runs with `-coverprofile` and uploads to Codecov with component flags
- **`test-integration` job**: Un-stub `test-integration` Makefile target; new CI job with per-operator matrix, `setup-envtest` for kubebuilder assets, `-coverprofile` output, Codecov upload
- **Codecov upload step**: `codecov/codecov-action` in `test` and `test-integration` jobs; uses `flags` parameter for component-level threshold matching in `.codecov.yml`
- **`e2e-keystone` job**: New job â€” `docker build` operator image, `kind load docker-image`, `helm install` from `operators/keystone/helm/keystone-operator/`, run Chainsaw tests from `tests/e2e/keystone/` (12 existing suites); depends on gate jobs passing
- **`build-and-push` job**: `docker/build-push-action` building `operators/keystone/Dockerfile`; `docker/metadata-action` derives tags (SemVer from `v*` tag, `main` branch SHA); pushes to GHCR; conditional on `github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'` or `startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')`
- **`helm-push` job**: `helm package operators/keystone/helm/keystone-operator/` â†’ `helm push` to `oci://ghcr.io/<owner>/charts/`; chart version set from git tag; same push conditions as `build-and-push`
- **`github-release` job**: On `v*` tags only; `gh release create ${{ github.ref_name }} --generate-notes` attaching packaged Helm chart tarball as release asset
- **`docker-build` Makefile target**: Replace current stub with `docker build -t $(IMG) -f operators/$(OPERATOR)/Dockerfile .` supporting `OPERATOR` and `IMG` variables
- **`helm-package` Makefile target**: Replace current stub with `helm package operators/$(OPERATOR)/helm/$(OPERATOR)-operator/` supporting `OPERATOR` variable
- **`test-integration` Makefile target**: Replace current stub with envtest-based test runner, filtering to `*/internal/controller/...` packages with build tag `integration`
- **`.codecov.yml`**: New file with `coverage.status.project` and `coverage.status.patch` settings; component definitions mapping `internal/common/**` â†’ 80%, `operators/*/internal/controller/**` â†’ 70%, `operators/*/api/**` â†’ 90%
